# Synthetic 2024 Shape Fixture

This synthetic fixture references the 2024 rules and Magic action wording. It is intentionally original test prose, not sourcebook text.

## Spell

This new spell appears on the Artificer's spell list.

### Clockwork Helper

*Level 2 Conjuration (ritual)*

**Casting Time:** 1 hour (ritual)
**Range:** 10 feet
**Components:** V, S, M (a polished gear worth 100+ GP)
**Duration:** Instant

You summon a tiny construct helper in an unoccupied space within range.

**Using a Higher-Level Spell Slot.** Use the spell slot's level for the helper's level.

------

## Artificer Subclasses

### Alchemist (Artificer Subclass)

*Craft test elixirs*

#### Experimental Elixir (Level 3)

You magically produce two elixirs. You can make a total of three at level 5, four at level 9, and five at level 15.

### Artillerist (Artificer Subclass)

*Craft test cannons*

#### Eldritch Cannon (Level 3)

You create an Eldritch Cannon.

### Battle Smith (Artificer Subclass)

*Command a construct guardian*

#### Steel Defender (Level 3)

Your tinkering has borne you a companion, a Steel Defender.

### Cartographer (Artificer Subclass)

*Chart test routes*

#### Adventurer's Atlas (Level 3)

You create maps up to a maximum number of creatures equal to 1 plus your Intelligence modifier.

#### Superior Atlas (Level 15)

The creature's Hit Points instead change to a number equal to twice your Artificer level.

------

## Feats

### Dragonmark Feats

### Mark of Storm

*Prerequisite: Eberron campaign; can't already have a Dragonmark feat*

You gain the following benefits.

**Storm's Boon.** You have Resistance to Lightning damage.

**Storm Magic.** You know the Thunderclap cantrip. When you reach character level 3, you also always have the Gust of Wind spell prepared.

**Spells of the Mark.** If you have the Spellcasting or Pact Magic class feature, the spells on the Mark of Storm Spells table are added to that feature's spell list.

| Spell Level | Spells |
| --- | --- |
| 1 | Feather Fall, Fog Cloud |

### General Feats

### Greater Mark of Handling

*Prerequisite: mark of handling; Level 4*

**Ability Score Increase.** Increase one ability score of your choice by 1, to a maximum of 20.

You gain the following benefits.

**Subdue Animal.** The target must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw (DC 8 plus your Wisdom modifier and Proficiency Bonus).

### Epic Boon Feat

### Boon of Siberys

*Prerequisite: Level 19; Eberron campaign*

**Ability Score Increase.** Increase one ability score of your choice by 1, to a maximum of 20.

You gain the following benefits.

**Aberrant Magic.** Choose a level 8 or lower spell from the Sorcerer spell list.

------

## Backgrounds

### House Agent

**Ability Scores:** Strength, Intelligence, Charisma
**Feat:** Lucky
**Skill Proficiencies:** Investigation and Persuasion
**Tool Proficiency:** Choose one kind of Artisan's Tools
**Equipment:** Choose A or B

You work for a powerful patron and carry useful credentials.
